posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 4 of 4 Pending | Tied for 1st with 20 others Rowe vs. KilburnPhil Rowe, TKO, R1What a meme fight. Massive WW vs Fat FW. Apparently this is at 185, I went to Kilburn’s ig and he is a HW now; he’s really let himself go. He was a bad fighter when active and became a jobber once he got cut from the ufc. Rowe is a bad mma fighter but has skills, he’s just got no tdd and is lazy af. Against a half retired fat FW I think he should find an easy ko here
